subcodes.first_line: O thou who callest unto the Covenant! As for the Ḥájí who, like unto a creditor, seeketh payment from the Turkish colonel and the soldier of Ádhirbáyján [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ینادی بالمیثاق جناب حاجی چون طلبکار سرهنگ ترک و سرباز آذربایجان
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @call to action, @firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
